LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS SARA DURYEA, AND EMMETT MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS CONSTITUTING A BREACH OF THE DUE ON SALE PROVISION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS SARA DURYEA AND EMMETT MURPHY'S MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATION WITHIN THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH THAT ANY OPTION HAS BEEN EXERCISED OR HAS OTHERWISE VIOLATED THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT. IF PLAINTIFFS ELECT TO AMEND THEIR NON-MONETARY BREACH ALLEGATION, DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO FILE THEIR ANSWER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. IF PLAINTIFFS ELECT TO NOT AMEND THEIR NON-MONETARY BREACH ALLEGATION, BECAUSE THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY SUSTAINED AND DEFENDANT HAVE NOT CHALLENGED THE SUFFICIENCY OF PLAINTIFF'S MONETARY BREACH ALLEGATION, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANTS TO FILE THEIR ANSWER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN TEN DAYS OF PLAINTIFFS PROVIDING WRITTEN NOTIFICATION OF THEIR ELECTION TO NOT AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. KATHERINE K. IKEDA OF ORRICK, HERRINGTON ET. AL., TEL. NO. 773-5922 FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY KEVIN F. ROONEY OF THE PINNACLE LAW GROUP LLP., TEL. NO. 394-5700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS- DEFENDANTS SARA DURYEA AND EMMETT MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. KATHERINE K. IKEDA OF ORRICK, HERRINGTON ET. AL., TEL. NO. 773-5922 FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY KEVIN F. ROONEY OF THE PINNACLE LAW GROUP LLP., TEL. NO. 394-5700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANTS SARA DURYEA AND EMMETT MURPHY'S MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATION WITHIN THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH THAT ANY OPTION HAS BEEN EXERCISED OR HAS OTHERWISE VIOLATED THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT. IF PLAINTIFFS ELECT TO AMEND THEIR NON-MONETARY BREACH ALLEGATION, DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO FILE THEIR ANSWER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. IF PLAINTIFFS ELECT TO NOT AMEND THEIR NON-MONETARY BREACH ALLEGATION, BECAUSE THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY SUSTAINED AND DEFENDANT HAVE NOT CHALLENGED THE SUFFICIENCY OF PLAINTIFF'S MONETARY BREACH ALLEGATION, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANTS TO FILE THEIR ANSWER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN TEN DAYS OF PLAINTIFFS PROVIDING WRITTEN NOTIFICATION OF THEIR ELECTION TO NOT AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT SARA DURYEA AND EMMETT MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS CONSTITUTING A BREACH OF THE DUE ON SALE PROVISION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/PM
